pi_items.source: Task requires saving to this path per task.json description, but verifier.py does not validate this specific path. Verifier checks for generic C:\tmp\task_result.json instead.
verifier.py line 120: checks cabinets_count >= 3 for passing score; task description explicitly states 'Place at least three (3) upper/wall kitchen cabinets'

verifier.py line 88: 'are there at least 3 upper cabinets visible on a wall in a kitchen setting?'; task description: 'Navigate to the kitchen area and place at least three (3) upper/wall kitchen cabinets'

verifier.py lines 87, 90-92: distinguishes between Base cabinets (on floor) and Wall cabinets (mounted higher on wall); verifier.py line 131: 'Cabinets identified as Wall/Upper type'; task description: 'place at least three (3) upper/wall kitchen cabinets'

privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding exactly 3 upper/wall cabinets to the kitchen area of a sample house project in DreamPlan Home Design Software. The furniture category is Kitchen and the item type is Wall Cabinet (distinct from base cabinets). The data is synthetic, consisting of a pre-built sample project that comes with DreamPlan software.
